strengths: Proven track record of AI and cloud infrastructure contributions, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on expertise in cutting-edge AI workflows and tooling

Entrepreneurial and intrapreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform used by NGOs globally, showcasing ability to drive innovation and build scalable, impactful products from the ground up

Deep technical versatility across full-stack development, low-latency systems, and infrastructure engineering, with fluency in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Kubernetes, and AWS, aligning with the role’s focus on AI-powered product development and cloud technologies
concerns: Lacks an advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) in an AI-related field, which is listed as a preferred qualification, though extensive practical experience may offset this gap

No explicit mention of direct experience advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption, a key responsibility, though leadership in open-source and technical mentorship suggests strong communication skills
Limited evidence of large-scale cloud platform strategy work at the director level, though current role at re:cinq and prior infrastructure contributions indicate foundational expertise
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo presents a compelling fit for the Principal Engineer role, with 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience spanning AI tooling, cloud infrastructure, and full-stack development. Their work at re:cinq on AI-agent frameworks and MCP code generators directly aligns with the role’s focus on AI strategy, while their entrepreneurial leadership of GISCollective demonstrates an ability to innovate and scale products—a critical asset for driving differentiation. Though lacking an advanced AI degree, their technical depth, builder fluency, and history of mentorship position them to inspire teams and advise on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption.
